{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of the Flowing Flame
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Path of the Flowing Flame]] involves [[dragon]]-fire behaving like a liquid.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of the Flowing Flame]] is associated with gold [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
